meta.description: nlmixr2 SAEM reference for openpkpd external validation
meta.model: warfarin PK-only 1-cmt oral, IIV on KA/CL/V, prop error
meta.tolerance_notes: SAEM parity is currently release-gated on fixed effects, not exact OFV or residual-variance parity, because the nlmixr2 SAEM run does not expose a stable scalar OFV on this benchmark and OpenPKPD still shows a residual-scale mismatch here.
